reviews.review_description: So I also downloaded this thinking it was the other Subliminal game. I jumped into this completely confused. I collected the torch and 7 lanterns and am now wandering around an empty pool room completely baffled as to what to do next. Tung Tung has also disappeared so what do I do now??

In this game's defense, I thought it was something else, so I set my expectations really high and boy was I disappointed. That being said. This game is just $7 so it's not too bad considering the lackluster experience. First off. There is only one small map with no slides! The map is a bit dull and has glitchy spots and textures. You get thrown right into the game with no menu or introduction and are tasked with finding eight lanterns. I actually liked this as it set the atmosphere. However, it took me awhile to figure out what I needed to find, and they weren't scattered across the map they would be periodically dropped, So I would have to walk around the whole map until I find one, then repeat 7 more times. It was very tedious and it got boring. The enemy or Monster in the game is also a unoriginal brain rot character. I was really hoping for something more. The enemy movement was very balanced and I enjoyed that aspect. The ending also left a lot to be desired. I'm not sure if there are multiple endings or not, but if so, I got the bad one.

TL:DR
5 of 10 game.
Wouldn't recommend playing but for $7 it's not too bad if you are looking for a quick spooky experience. Only features one map and it's kind of dull and it doesn't feature any slides or fun mechanics.
